channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 2nd March

Dumped bags of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grasmere Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Street cleaning needed around the council bin, 2nd March
item.description:
Debris is constantly spilling out of this street bin. It is irregularity emptied and the staff from the company responsible for taking the bags away say it is not their job to pick up the bits left on the pavement. This rubbish has been building up for years - the curb is full of paper and plastic bottles from the spread. Lambeth Council just don’t clean the area. It’s gross.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119D, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole Roundabout Has A Road Problem, 2nd March
item.description:
This needs an emergency fix, very very difficult to navigate this safely now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mercedes looks to be abandoned, 2nd March
item.description:
It’s blocking the road in both directions causing traffic. Mercedes is the issue. Flatbed has always been there so think it’s a residents around here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandringham Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary Traffic Light Stuck on Red, 2nd March
item.description:
Risk of crashes and road rage but already causing traffic problems. These SGN temporary lights are stuck on red.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollards and light not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Cray avenue Orpington the bollards on cray avenue Orpington opposite 83 Cray Avenue were hit and damaged in November this has been reported several times the light does not work and a bollard is missing why has this. problem not been sorted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intercom system, 2nd March
item.description:
There was power outage in the building over the weekend and the fob reader for this door isn't working no one can get through

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nest Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Marmont Road Dunstall house, 2nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping and rubbish present since Saturday day time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Staffordshire Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Lots of potholes on the road, 2nd March
item.description:
Become dangerous to drive there as drivers swing around to avoid potholes make risk elevated high
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary Traffic Lights Broken, 2nd March
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights are out - showing red at all times in both directions. Noticed at 7:15am and still the case at 8:30pm. Traffic chaos and dangerous for drivers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside our house, 2nd March
item.description:
Hello - the attached items appeared outside our house overnight. It’s an odd place to dump this household waste between number 12/14 Kersley Road. The items appeared on the evening of 01/03/2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kersley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip on the green verge, 2nd March
item.description:
Again rubbish here, please attend and rectify

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23,24, Craylands, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
